items.quote: We waren in Nederland voor de bruiloft van goede vrienden en hadden de kans om te slapen in deze prachtige nieuwe B&B. De locatie is geniaal gezien het aan de Utrechtse Heuvelrug ligt in Maarsbergen en aan een groene bosrand. Het huis is fantastisch verbouwd door de eigenaar Emile en we hadden zelfs de kans om te genieten van een diner met de hosts Emile & Rachel.
items.author: Joep & Lotus - Spanje

items.quote: We traveled from Maine to visit family in Holland. We stayed on this sweet property, which proved to be the ideal accommodation for our family of four. The bedrooms were perfectly sized, and the upper bunkroom—complete with a charming ladder setup—was a highly enjoyable and memorable feature for our children, ages 4 and 8. The property features an updated, modern bathroom and a full kitchen, including a stove, refrigerator, and dishwasher, which made preparing family meals seamless. We particularly appreciated the outdoor space, where we enjoyed our morning coffee daily. Furthermore, the hosts were incredibly gracious and offered excellent local recommendations and catering promptly to our needs. We highly recommend this rental for travelors!
items.author: Danielle, Spancer, Harbor & Reed

items.quote: Beautiful location and a very comfortable cottage. Peaceful, well-equipped, and close to some great walking trails. We really enjoyed our stay.
items.author: Meredith - USA
